M

Mooz AI Catalog

Mock Products Catalog for Development

Local Express
GitHub Pages Ready

Production Simulation API

This dashboard serves as an explorer for the items catalog. The API returns a collection of ingredients and products with their EAN code, available stock, and prices, enabling the simulation of a complete production database.

Total Items 0
Stock Value (Excl. Tax) 0.00 €
Categories Represented 0
Low Stock Alerts 0
EAN Article Category Designation Available Stock Stock Days Price HT
Loading products...
Showing 0-0 of 0 products
Show:
JSON Inspector

Click on a product in the table to inspect its raw JSON payload.

API Endpoints

Local Server (Express)

Start the API and fetch locally:

GET
http://localhost:3001/products

Production Server (Static)

Hosted directly on GitHub Pages:

GET
https://[username].github.io/[repo]/products.json

Note: On GitHub Pages, static files act as read-only endpoints.
